message:
test(server): add 14 tests for disk_monitor, tool_metrics, cleanup thin modules

Coverage expansion for 3 server crate modules (br-3h13.5.4):
- disk_monitor.rs: +4 tests (all pressure variants, recovery transitions,
  large interval, u64::MAX free bytes)
- tool_metrics.rs: +4 tests (call+error tracking, multiple tools sorted,
  empty snapshot after reset, slow tools threshold)
- cleanup.rs: +6 tests (question mark glob, whitespace-only pattern,
  nested glob, nonexistent workspace, no matching files)

Also includes cargo fmt fix for ack_ttl.rs register_agent call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
